goal: Tier 1 ONNX speaker classifier — replace 58-dim handcrafted features with a learned 192-dim speaker embedding from SpeechBrain ECAPA-TDNN converted to ONNX. Same SpeakerClassifier.classify interface so existing wiring (orchestrator, benchmark) is unchanged. Target: 24%→90%+ on the existing 5-voice ElevenLabs closed-set.
